## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Kevin Indig and Marcel Santilli's company, fwd.digital, in the SEO and content creation space.](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company has developed advanced AI-driven workflows for content creation, research, and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Kevin's expertise in high-level SEO strategy could complement fwd.digital's execution capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in exploring collaboration, starting with referrals and potentially evolving into strategic partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [There's mutual interest in leveraging AI to enhance Kevin's strategic offerings and fwd.digital's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's AI-Driven Content Creation Process

  - [Developed sophisticated workflows using AI for research, content creation, and post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Incorporates vector databases, custom research agents, and human review stages](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Adapts to different content types (technical, legal) and client needs](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Challenges include improving technical topic coverage and integrating human expertise efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Kevin's Current Business Model

  - [Focuses on high-level SEO strategy for clients (e.g., growth evaluation, investment decisions)](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Works with a small number of clients, typically spending about a day per week per client](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Considering offering an "expertise retainer" model (2 hours/month, $6k) in the future](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)

### Potential Collaboration Models

  - [Immediate opportunity: Referral partnership (10% rev share on fwd.digital's retainers)](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Strategic client collaboration: Joint work on high-value accounts like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [AI-enhanced strategy development: Building workflows based on Kevin's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Possible equity/advisor role if fwd.digital pursues VC funding](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)

### Case Study: Reddit

  - [Current client at $9k/month, potentially scaling to $36-45k/month](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Challenges: New business.reddit.com domain, targeting SMBs and agencies](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Opportunity: Leverage Reddit's data and develop comprehensive growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### AI in Strategy Development

  - [Exploring how AI can assist in strategic planning and research](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Potential to create AI models trained on Kevin's expertise and methodologies](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to follow up by end of week with specific collaboration ideas](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Identify 1-2 potential clients to scope out a joint engagement](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Kevin to provide a testimonial quote for fwd.digital's new website](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [Explore training an AI model on Kevin's expertise and content](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Continue discussions on referral partnership and potential strategic collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/L7mCAS5TaW1MHNwa33yQNyoSYcAk3Jcy?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
